## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in on Usman's production and client transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Smith SEO:** Use GSC/GA as the source of truth, not SEMrush, and wait 3–6 months post-publish before refreshing to allow time for ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Outreach Onboarding:** Prioritize LLM visibility and persona-specific content (e.g., CROs), as Outreach is a demanding client.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Smith Backlog:** Industry pages are blocked pending client review; article refreshes can be published immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**New Content Tactic:** Integrate specific, real-world examples (e.g., car accidents for law) to better connect with Smith's user base.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Topics

### Smith SEO Performance

  - [**Problem:** Smith articles with high keyword difficulty are not ranking in the top 100 on SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**Data Source:** Use Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics (GA) as the source of truth for organic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
          - [**Why:** SEMrush's traffic estimates are unreliable; GSC/GA provide direct, accurate data.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Wait 3–6 months post-publish before refreshing content.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
          - [**Why:** SEO takes time; articles can climb the ranks after a Google core update.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Link from new articles to underperforming ones using the target anchor text to boost authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Outreach Onboarding & Strategy

  - [**Client Profile:** Demanding and detail-oriented, requiring high-quality, structured content.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Content Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Optimize for large language models (LLMs) with clear, chunked content (e.g., FAQs, key takeaways).](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Persona Focus:** Target one specific decision-maker persona per article (e.g., CROs, RevOps).](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Tool Selection:** Send a brief with tool suggestions for client approval *before* drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
          - [**Why:** Avoid including direct competitors (e.g., Gong) and ensure enterprise-grade relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Production:** 5 articles per week, starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Smith Production Backlog

  - [**Industry Pages:** 16 pages are blocked pending review from Madi.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Why:** Madi was unavailable this week.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Article Refreshes:** Can be published immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**New Pipelines:** Usman will test new pipelines for industry refreshes and YouTube scripts.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### New Content Tactic: Specific Examples

  - [**Tactic:** Include specific, real-world examples in articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**Why:** This tactic resonates with Madi's focus on user-centric language and helps drive business for clients like law firms.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

      - [Implement internal linking from new to underperforming Smith articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [Meet with Jen to clarify Outreach pipeline status.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Draft 1–2 Outreach articles this weekend to prepare for the 5/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Test the new Smith pipelines for refreshes and YouTube scripts.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [Integrate specific examples into new Smith content.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [Follow up with Madi on the 16 blocked Smith industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9ymgqE_FHAFw_s-Qq9eh-zHNaj-CXgK2?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
